content: Most existing explorations of Self-Refine treat it as a standalone single-loop refinement pipeline, but we can reframe it as the base execution layer for multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms: each perspective of the self-reflection mechanism can run its own independent Self-Refine iteration loop to critique and improve outputs from its specific angle, before aggregating cross-perspective feedback for a final round of global refinement. This hybrid framework retains Self-Refine's core advantage of requiring no additional supervised training or external data, while addressing Self-Refine's common blind spot of consistent one-perspective feedback bias.
